## [00:00 - 01:22]

So very quickly, I want to show you how to assess what creative work the best when you're using dynamic creative, which is what I had set up in the first round of rapid fire testing. So you'll see under the outset, it only appears that there's one ad here. However, there's many, many, many, many variations of this because this is using essentially the dynamic creative feature where I can upload lots of headlines and text, etc. So in the reporting columns, the way that I assess what works. So for example, we had a sale here. So I can basically click on dynamic creative here and click on image videos, for example. And you can see here, this image of me presenting was the one that gave us the sale. If we go into headlines for freelancers looking to increase their prices. If we go into text, Facebook ad campaigns, giving you a problem. So I can start to break down, etc. Exactly what creative combinations gave me that sale and also what price that came in at that level. So this is a mini, mini crash course on how to assess and see what what combinations work the best for your ads.
